content: Did the null pointer fix for avatars get deployed? Any issues?

Yes, the fix was deployed yesterday. The Option<String> change and default avatar URL are working correctly. We haven't seen any null pointer crashes since the deploy. The migration ran cleanly on all environments.
Great. Let's make sure we add similar null checks for the other optional profile fields.
I'll audit all profile fields. The bio, website, and location fields also need the Option treatment. I'll create a follow-up PR for those.
